_notes: Annotated template for the third-party agents file; see docs/AGENTS_FILE.md for the schema.
Consumers ignore unknown keys, so these _notes travel with the file harmlessly.
Every model string below is an example: confirm each one against the CLI actually installed
on your machine (for kimi, read default_model from the kimi CLI config or run one minimal
call and check the session record) before relying on it.
This file is also the shared parsing fixture for the review-swarm and derivation-verify tests.

claude.notes: The host agent's own family, served by the host's native subagents in-process. CLI launchers reject family: specs that resolve to a native runner; derivation-verify takes host-supplied native_derivations instead.

glm.notes: run review invocations in the foreground; background concurrency has died silently

kimi.notes: Model alias as accepted by the kimi CLI -m flag. The executable is the current kimi binary (Kimi Code); the runner skill directory name kimi-cli-runner is historical.

gemini.notes: no local access on this machine
